The MRU College Fellowship, for US undergrad and grad students, helps Fellows produce their own videos, podcasts, or other online content to bring economic insights to a wide audience. Fellows are paired with MRU mentors for a seven-week remote program,…
|
By Tyler Cowen on January 12, 2026
|
The [MRU College Fellowship](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=668bddbb2b36b1131f25c9e1abaf14b6f5bd318982201a1a61359d49825b1ab0&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92212&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=35ff52468810a48ae5dd63788eb48af4&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=2dc1eb6b7804f0f0cc1bdbcfe7de7409), for US undergrad and grad students, helps Fellows produce their own videos, podcasts, or other online content to bring economic insights to a wide audience. Fellows are paired with MRU mentors for a seven-week remote program, starting with an expenses-paid weekend kickoff event in DC. Fellows also earn a $2,000 stipend.
|
|
|
|
